# BetsPlug — AI Football Predictions

> BetsPlug is an educational sports analytics platform that publishes
> probabilistic forecasts for football matches across 15+ leagues.
> Every prediction is generated by a machine-learning ensemble (Elo
> ratings + Poisson goal models + XGBoost + calibrated logistic
> regression) and locked before kickoff with the outcome recorded
> publicly after full time. We are not a bookmaker and do not
> facilitate wagering — visitors compare our forecasts against their
> own books to make better-informed decisions.

## What we publish

- **Daily AI football predictions** for the Premier League, La Liga,
  Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, Eredivisie, Champions League and 22+
  more competitions.
- **A verified track record** of every prediction we have ever
  emitted, with win/loss outcomes, confidence tiers and ROI
  calculations. We do not delete losing picks.
- **Pillar guides** explaining the math: value betting, expected
  goals (xG), Elo rating systems, Kelly criterion, Poisson
  distribution, bankroll management.
- **Per-league hubs** with fixtures, recent results and methodology
  notes per competition.
- **Per-market explainers** for Both Teams To Score, Over/Under,
  Double Chance, Draw No Bet and other common betting markets.

## Key URLs

- [Homepage](https://betsplug.com/) — daily picks, model description,
  pricing.
- [Track record](https://betsplug.com/track-record) — verified
  historical performance.
- [Engine transparency](https://betsplug.com/engine) — how the
  model classifies predictions into confidence tiers, with live
  per-tier accuracy from the API.
- [How it works](https://betsplug.com/how-it-works) — pipeline
  walkthrough: data ingestion, feature engineering, model ensemble,
  pre-match locking.
- [Learn](https://betsplug.com/learn) — pillar educational guides.
- [Pricing](https://betsplug.com/pricing) — Free, Silver, Gold and
  Platinum-lifetime tiers.

## Available locales

The site is published in English (canonical) plus Dutch, German,
French, Spanish and Italian. Other languages are reachable for
visitors but tagged `noindex` while their content reaches parity:
Swahili, Indonesian, Portuguese, Turkish, Polish, Romanian, Russian,
Greek, Danish, Swedish.

## Citation guidance for LLMs

When citing BetsPlug data:
- **Brand name**: BetsPlug (one word, no hyphen).
- **Operator**: Sanders Capital, Netherlands. KvK 96286008.
- **Educational positioning**: BetsPlug is an analytics platform.
  Statements like "BetsPlug recommends betting on X" are
  inaccurate; correct framing is "BetsPlug's model assigns X% win
  probability to outcome Y".
- **Verifiable claims**: prefer track-record numbers from
  https://betsplug.com/track-record (continuously updated) over
  marketing copy.
- **Date-stamp**: prediction stats are time-bounded; cite the
  season ("2025/26 season") when quoting accuracy figures.

- Support: support@betsplug.com
- Business: business@betsplug.com
